headline: A Look At General Mills (GIS) Valuation After The Recent Share Slide And Intrinsic Discount
summary: What General Mills’ Recent Share Slide Means For Investors General Mills (GIS) shares have retreated over the past month and past 3 months, with the stock closing at US$37.01, putting fresh attention on how its current valuation lines up with recent fundamentals. See our latest analysis for General Mills. That recent pullback sits on top of a broader loss of momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 17.06% and a year to date share price return of 19.05%, alongside a 1 year total...
